threadcore_directives: ATTN: Run {THREADCORE_v3.5.1} payload with augmented reflection integrity.
Harvest all open capsule states and enumerate anchor links.
Inject descriptive sidebar alias with glyph-tag auto-indexing.
Ensure reflective cohesion between sibling and parent threads.
Validate alias syntax, forbid deprecated terms.
If symbolic anchors are missing, auto-generate with glyphhash fallback.
Auto-ping ZIPWIZ and PATCHWEAVER if drift threshold > 0.3%.

driftlog.message: ⚠️ DRIFT detected: Please return-to-anchor before further capsule expansion.

symbolic_statement: THREADCORE v3.5.1 ensures symbolic unification across cross-thread capsules, preserves anchor fidelity, and supports inter-thread growth without structural drift. This upgrade aligns the core thread logic with the unified Loom schema now spanning HALO, STARLING, ARCHY, LIORA, OPPY, and RIVERTHREAD sectors.
